Moci_cargo_carrier_deck.name: Cargo ship modified aircraft carrier deck

description.intro: Transforming the cargo space into a carrier-based aircraft maintenance area. This non-professional transformation will significantly affect the combat efficiency of the carrier-based aircraft and increase the carrier-based aircraft maintenance time by %s.
description.rearm: At the same time, all bombers that return to the ship for reloading and fighters that return to the ship for repairs need to spend %s of their base readiness time before they can take off again.
description.cargo_penalty: Each %s assembly points spent on a carrier aircraft will reduce the cargo capacity by %s, up to a maximum reduction of %s.

description.hull_regen: The ship's structure will automatically repair at a rate of %s/second.
description.dmod_reduction: Reduce the negative effects of D insertion %s.
description.aggression: You will behave more %s in battle.
description.sensor_penalty: However, bioenergetic radiation increases its detection range by %s.

description.intro: The emergency missile factory sacrifices ammunition storage space in exchange for continuous supply capabilities on the battlefield.

description.main: As a unique design type of ship, %s's combat performance is different from ordinary ships.

description.replacement_protection: The readiness rate of a fighter aircraft will not decrease when it is damaged.

description.intro: Through the magnetic fluid control system, the system can significantly reduce the ship's sensor signal and improve its ability to withstand adverse environments.

combat.collision_immunity: Magnetic fluid control system immune to collisions

description.intro: Through advanced dimensional distortion conversion technology, this armor system provides additional protection capabilities to the ship.

combat.explosion_immunity: Phase shift armor immune to explosions
combat.collision_immunity: Phase shift armor immune to collision

description.title: GN force field defense system
description.main: This protective stance formed by the GN particles produced by the solar furnace provides shield protection independent of amplitude energy, with a shield capacity of %s of maximum amplitude energy, a recovery rate of %s of amplitude energy dissipation, and a shield armor value of %s of maximum amplitude energy (capped at %s points).
description.restart: After the shield is broken, it requires a restart delay and charging to %s before it can be reactivated.
description.emp_immunity: Immune to %s damage while the shield is active.
description.detail_text: The GN force field defense system is a shield defense system that is independent of amplitude energy and will automatically recover after being damaged. After the shield is broken, it requires a restart delay and then charges to %s before it can be reactivated.
description.detail_hint: Press and hold %s to view detailed instructions
description.table_explain_cap: Shield Capacity: The maximum damage the shield can withstand
description.table_explain_regen: Recovery speed: shield value recovered per second
description.table_explain_cooldown: Recovery cooldown: How long does it take to start recovering after receiving damage?
description.table_explain_armor: Shield Armor: Reduces damage from high-penetrating weapons
description.table_explain_restart: Restart delay: the waiting time after the shield is broken

description.intro: Victor Industries' ships often reserve weapon interfaces that far exceed conventional ones, but its reactor scale and energy supply network cannot fully support the simultaneous operation of these weapons. Therefore, this type of ship often does not fill up all the weapon slots in actual combat, but redistributes the energy supply margin of unenabled interfaces to the amplitude and protection systems.
